Event: The Volcanic Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 10/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: M27
Plunderer of the Depths Mace

When attacking, has a 40% chance of stunning an enemy for 3 sec.
Once in a while, the unit starts crushing the ground around it. For 4 sec., every second, the unit turns 2 nearest enemy units to stone for 2 sec. During that time, they cannot move, and the damage they receive is increased by 40%. Every second for 4 sec., all petrified enemy units also receive 600000 pure damage, and exhaustion is cast upon them. Every second, the target receives physical damage equal to 250% of the unit's attack. While an enemy unit is afflicted with exhaustion, the damage they deal and their attack speed are reduced by 30%. Exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: The Volcanic Treasure Hunt

Event date: 10/10/2025

Sage bot code: M27

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
